All active digits are clearly visible and unambiguous. The leading '1' is distinct from inactive placeholders and not clipped. The decimal point is clear. Structured verifier confirmed the same reading.
Correct

Reason
Structured verifier: The proposed value '18.540' does not match the visible display. The display clearly shows '8.8540'. The first digit is '8', not '1', and there is an additional '8' after the decimal point in the actual reading. Consensus override: structured verifier replaced the weaker primary read. Applied the fixed 3-decimal contract for this target. Final read remained partially ambiguous after verification; returning the best-supported value.
Mismatch
